generated_oml:
instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for post-occupancy data collection supporting visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring supporting energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring supporting comfort levels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for post-occupancy data collection supporting non-visual health effects analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Light intensity data stream for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data stream for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity data stream for comfort level analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration data stream for health impact assessment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance HonoDittoMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware metadata for Eclipse Hono and Ditto configuration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with Building Control System (BCS) runtime semantics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelValidation
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for managing digital twins and device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for immersive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualization
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, RuntimeArtifactsGeneration
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatterns, ComfortLevels, HealthImpactAssessments
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario testing and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatterns, ComfortLevels
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatterns, ComfortLevels, HealthImpactAssessments, AdjustLighting
]

instance ImmersiveVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization of building data using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComfortLevels
]

instance BIMModelValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validation of BIM models for accuracy and compliance with standards"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance RuntimeArtifactsGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactInsight
]

instance EnergyUsagePatterns : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy usage patterns derived from sensor data and analytics"
]

instance ComfortLevels : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comfort levels based on lighting and environmental data"
]

instance HealthImpactAssessments : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effects analysis from environmental data"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results of BIM models for structural and functional accuracy"
]

instance RuntimeArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated runtime artifacts for digital twin deployment"
]

instance AdjustLighting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting systems based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems in Building Control Systems (BCS) as per BOREALIS project"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure within AECO domain for unified virtual representation"
    base:contains BIMModel, LightSensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, LightingActuator, RealTimeMonitoring, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalytics, ImmersiveVisualization
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of control commands (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting levels) from the DT to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling real-time adjustments to building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data flow for monitoring and control; no specific time intervals specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular constellation integrating BIM as the semantic backbone for spatial data, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for IoT data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for immersive visualization, and extensible service modules for domain-specific functionality."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life-cycle stages including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, providing continuous digital representation from initial planning through operational use and future modifications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which measures interoperability and architectural soundness; no specific error margins or uncertainty quantification methods detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware without specified communication protocols."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Scalable deployment framework with no specific hosting environment details provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for interoperability, though specific external systems beyond BIM and DT components are not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM as the primary standard for semantic integration, with standardized extension points for modular service integration and interoperability."
]
